formulary tiers over time. See PRE_ICL_DRUG_TYPE_TIER_01 - PRE_ICL_DRUG_TYPE_TIER_09. 

In 2006 there were eight tiers (i.e., variable called PRE_ICL_DRUG_TYPE_TIER_09 did not apply). 
During 2008- 2010 there were only seven tiers (i.e., variables PRE_ICL_DRUG_TYPE_TIER_08 and 
PRE_ICL_DRUG_TYPE_TIER_09 were not applicable). For 2011 and later, there were only six tiers (i.e., 
variable called PRE_ICL_DRUG_TYPE_TIER_07 was not applicable
